body: Opus batch review of 4f5b554. Schema now has: mutations beadCreate/beadUpdate/beadClaim/beadUnclaim/beadReopen/documentWrite (lines 1718-1752), subscriptions workerProgress/beadLifecycle/executionEvidence/coordinatorMetrics (lines 1812-1834). Each docstring maps to its backend (REST route or event source). No name collisions with pre-existing Query-side names. APPROVE, leave closed.
summary: APPROVE: all 6 mutations + 4 subscriptions present and mapped to real backends
